summary: Iteration 184: Sfridi, Controlli Visivi, Registro NC, and NC Alerts Admin UI. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified with all three new sections (Controlli Visivi, Registro Non Conformità, Sfridi — Magazzino) working correctly in CommessaOpsPanel.
critical_code_review_comments: sfridi.py: Well-structured API with proper Pydantic models for SfridoCreate and SfridoPrelievo
sfridi.py: Correctly verifies certificate doc exists and enriches sfrido with cert_info
qualita.py: Controlli Visivi endpoint correctly auto-creates NC + alert when esito=NOK
qualita.py: _create_nc helper properly creates both NC entry and admin alert
officina.py: Alerts endpoints (count, list, mark_read) work without auth for dashboard access
SfridiSection.js: Clean create form with cert 3.1 dropdown, clickable cert link via blob URL
ControlliVisiviSection.js: Large OK/NOK buttons with proper visual feedback, status banner
RegistroNCSection.js: NC list with status badges (aperta/in_corso/chiusa) and action buttons
CommessaOpsPanel.js: Correctly integrates all 3 new sections with proper visibility rules
Dashboard.js: NC alert banner with red card and 'Vai' navigation buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 184 added Admin UI for Sfridi, Controlli Visivi, and Registro NC. All endpoints require auth except /api/officina/alerts/* which are public for dashboard. SfridiSection has cert 3.1 dropdown and clickable link. ControlliVisiviSection has OK/NOK buttons that auto-create NC on NOK. RegistroNCSection shows NC list with status management. Dashboard shows NC alert banner when unread alerts exist.

frontend_components.CommessaOpsPanel: ✓ Shows all 3 new sections (Controlli Visivi, Registro NC, Sfridi)

SfridiSection.create_form: ✓ Visible with tipo_materiale, quantita, numero_colata, cert_select, note fields

ControlliVisiviSection.status_banner: ✓ Shows '1 controlli mancanti, 0 NOK senza azione correttiva'
ControlliVisiviSection.ok_nok_buttons: ✓ Large OK (👍) and NOK (👎) buttons present

RegistroNCSection.empty_state: ✓ Shows 'Nessuna Non Conformità registrata.' with green checkmark
RegistroNCSection.summary_bar: ✓ Would show aperte/in_corso/chiuse counts when NCs exist

Dashboard.nc_alert_banner: ⚠ Not visible (no unread NC alerts for test user)
Dashboard.quality_alert_badge: ⚠ Not visible (no alerts for test user)
